name: startup-assessment
description: AI-powered startup investment assessment. Structured due diligence across 10 domains with scoring, sensitivity analysis, and go/no-go investment recommendations.

commands.name: initiate
commands.description: Scaffold the assessment workspace and save business case documents

commands.name: pre-assess
commands.description: Run initial pre-assessment: context extraction, framework building, research, scoring, gap analysis, and preliminary go/no-go

commands.name: assess
commands.description: Run full domain assessment: deep evaluation across all domains, cross-domain reconciliation, and final determination

commands.name: sensitivity
commands.description: Run sensitivity analysis: robustness testing, scenario modeling, flip-point identification, and Path B eligibility

commands.name: recommend
commands.description: Generate recommendations: improvement roadmap (Path A) and alternative deal structures (Path B)
